'''pachoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatisation|pneumatisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatisation|pneumatisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pachoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæcheheth|pæcheheth]] || [[word:pæchehej|pæchehej]] || [[word:pæchehesh|pæchehesh]] || [[word:pæchehe|pæchehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachochohoth|pachochohoth]] || [[word:pachochohoj|pachochohoj]] || [[word:pachochohosh|pachochohosh]] || [[word:pachochoho|pachochoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachohoth|pachohoth]] || [[word:pachohoj|pachohoj]] || [[word:pachohosh|pachohosh]] || [[word:pachoho|pachoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachofhoth|pachofhoth]] || [[word:pachofhoj|pachofhoj]] || [[word:pachofhosh|pachofhosh]] || [[word:pachofhof|pachofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachohotho|pachohotho]] || [[word:pachohojo|pachohojo]] || [[word:pachohosho|pachohosho]] || [[word:pachohoko|pachohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachohoth|pachohoth]] || [[word:pachohoj|pachohoj]] || [[word:pachohosh|pachohosh]] || [[word:pachoho|pachoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachohothol|pachohothol]] || [[word:pachohojol|pachohojol]] || [[word:pachohoshol|pachohoshol]] || [[word:pachohokol|pachohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachohothotho|pachohothotho]] || [[word:pachohojojo|pachohojojo]] || [[word:pachohoshosho|pachohoshosho]] || [[word:pachohoko|pachohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachohothon|pachohothon]] || [[word:pachohojon|pachohojon]] || [[word:pachohoshon|pachohoshon]] || [[word:pachohokon|pachohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachohothoro|pachohothoro]] || [[word:pachohojoro|pachohojoro]] || [[word:pachohoshoro|pachohoshoro]] || [[word:pachohokoro|pachohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
